hero.title: The local nodes of the Greenpill network.
hero.dek: Browse public chapter records, regional anchors, and source-backed activity across the network.
hero.body: The index should lead with chapters that have public proof, and keep thin or internally sourced chapter records visibly out of the featured tier until steward review closes.

sections.title: Start with the strongest public proof.
sections.dek: Nigeria, Brasil, GreenSofa, NYC, Koh Phangan, Cote d'Ivoire, Germany, and Kenya have the clearest public footprints in the research artifact.
sections.body: Cape Town is active and still needs public-source backfill before it should carry strong launch claims.

filterCopy.emptyState: No source-backed chapter records match this filter yet.
